description: Before an aircraft rolls out of the factory, a quality inspector must perform a final walk-around inspection to check for any defects.

nodes.task_description: Follow a detailed checklist to inspect the aircraft's exterior for any cosmetic defects, such as scratches or dents.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent completes the exterior inspection checklist.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all required placards and markings are correctly installed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all placards are present and legible.

nodes.task_description: Document any findings and create a snag list of items to be rectified before the official rollout.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds a minor paint defect and adds it to the snag list.
